feature_history.name: Hierarchical Power Protocol
feature_history.description: 3-tier roles: User, Employee, Admin. Financial authority (canManageCredits) is now a separate privilege granted only by the root node.

feature_history.name: Admin Registry: Role Management
feature_history.description: Admin can now re-classify any node (User/Employee/Admin) directly from the registry console.

feature_history.name: Silent Classification Protocol
feature_history.description: User roles are hidden in the sidebar and dashboard, visible only to authorized admin nodes.

feature_history.name: Self-Registration Protocol
feature_history.description: Allows new users to create nodes and automatically receive starting credits.
